title: cynoglossum ancyritanum
intro: Cynoglossum ancyritanum, also known as Fringe Cups, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum ancyritanum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
